response.justification: While the candidate has significant experience with C++ (including some professional roles) and strong SQL skills, their recent work has focused heavily on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and other technologies (e.g., DLang, Python) rather than C++ or capital markets domains. Their domain expertise does not align with fixed income systems, and there is no evidence of Summit platform experience or CI/CD pipeline knowledge for financial systems.
strengths: Strong SQL and database management experience with multiple systems
Extensive professional experience (12+ years) in software development across diverse domains
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and open-source contributions
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last prominent role was 2015 at National Instruments; resume emphasizes other languages)
No demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains
Lacks mandatory technical skills for the role (e.g., Summit platform, Windows C++ development at scale in financial systems)
